div.div:
- Pin numbers are ESP32 GPIO numbers, not board pins or Arduino pins.- No pin shown: Assume No board connection (NC) (outside of general debug headers)
- All I2C devices can share the same bus if they behave nicely, but otherwise there is a spare bus.
- All pins should have a total of two - three female headers available for debugging and modifications, including any stacking headers.
